steps.title: Match the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants a generalization about the kind of study Feldman, Hart, and Shah conducted. The relevant notes are that they used statistical methods and that the methods addressed disputed authorship of musical material. Because the goal is broad, a one-song conclusion is too narrow.

steps.title: Avoid one-song summaries
steps.content: Choices A, B, and C focus on who wrote the verse for In My Life. Those statements may use details from the notes, but they do not generalize about the type of research method or field. The answer is D.
